text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is winding down. Including our trip
to Hokkaido, it was a busy summer to say the
least.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in the midst of it, Mejiro Palmer was able to
discover that all she really wants is to run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I love running! I wanna keep running! Like,
from now on to forever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But do you think that's enough? I can't help but
feel like it's not when I see her like that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look in the direction Mejiro Palmer is gazing at.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come. Long-distance races
like the upcoming G1 Kikuka Sho are my
specialty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will seize victory! And I will do the same at the spring Tenno Sho next year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, McQueen's determination is on a whole
other level. She's already won in that department,
before she even steps on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, I just like to run. I'm not even sure if I
like racing yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno if I belong out there with her, running all
willy-nilly like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, there I go, overthinking again. My poor
head can't handle all these thoughts... Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This difference in passion for racing is throwing
Mejiro Palmer for a loop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just, sorry. Once I get hooked on something, I
can't really snap out of it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I run 'cause I wanna, and that should be enough,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess I've got way more angsty main character
energy than I thought I did... Sorry for being
difficult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that she tends to be unconfident and, as
she puts it, "angsty," but...
choice_data_list: I think you're fine, angst and all.
I think you're fine, angst and all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oop, there you go, being all lenient and
accepting on me again. Seriously, it's because
you're always so considerate that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Meh, why not? I'll take all that nonjudgmental
acceptance and support. Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've got some figurin' out do to! I wanna suss out
what it is I really wanna do.
